## JSON Schema Options

JSON Schema array options

```tsx
{
   "type": "array",
   "x-options": {
      "showEditJsonAction": false
   }
}
```


#### collapsed

<Code>{`collapsed?: boolean;`}</Code>


if set, will add an accordion in the given toggle state
#### showEditJsonAction

<Code>{`showEditJsonAction?: boolean;`}</Code>


if set, will add an edit-json action to edit, copy and paste json-data for this location
#### isOptional

<Code>{`isOptional?: boolean;`}</Code>


Is set internally to true to add a delete option for this object.
#### showInlineAddAction

<Code>{`showInlineAddAction?: boolean;`}</Code>


set to true to show inline button at the end of the array to add another item
#### showHeaderMenu

<Code>{`showHeaderMenu?: boolean;`}</Code>


set to false to deactivate array menu
#### showItemControls

<Code>{`showItemControls?: boolean;`}</Code>


set to false to deactivate any array item-controls
#### descriptionInline

<Code>{`descriptionInline?: boolean;`}</Code>


set to true to inline description
#### sortable

<Code>{`sortable?: SortableOptions;`}</Code>


set to `{ enabled: true }` for dragndrop
#### showTitleDivider

<Code>{`showTitleDivider?: boolean;`}</Code>


if true will add a separator line to the header
#### dividerProps

<Code>{`dividerProps?: Pick<DividerProps, 'labelPosition' | 'color'>;`}</Code>


placement of title within the separator
#### titleProps

<Code>{`titleProps?: TitleProps;`}</Code>


Mantine Title Props
#### selectable

<Code>{`selectable?: boolean;`}</Code>

#### showHeader

<Code>{`showHeader?: boolean;`}</Code>


if false, will hide title. will hide complete title-header if no menu-actions are available
#### widgetMenuItems

<Code>{`widgetMenuItems?: WidgetMenuItems;`}</Code>

#### widget
